inputs.label: Fuel Consumption (L/100km)
inputs.businessContext: Measured or rated fuel consumption in liters per 100 kilometers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Measured or rated fuel consumption in liters per 100 kilometers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 100 kilometrede litre cinsinden ölçülen veya derecelendirilen yakıt tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gemessener oder angegebener Kraftstoffverbrauch in Litern pro 100 Kilometer.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation de carburant mesurée ou nominale en litres aux 100 kilomètres.
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo de combustible medido o estimado en litros por 100 kilómetros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: استهلاك الوقود المقاس أو المقدر باللتر لكل 100 كيلومتر.

businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 = ABD galonu (3.785411784 L), 2 = İngiltere galonu (4.54609 L).
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 = galón estadounidense (3.785411784 L), 2 = galón británico (4.54609 L).
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 = غالون أمريكي (3.785411784 لتر)، 2 = غالون بريطاني (4.54609 لتر).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for output rounding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for output rounding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çıktı yuvarlama için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für die Ausgaberundung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour l'arrondi du résultat.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para el redondeo de salida.

inputs.label: Measurement Standard
inputs.businessContext: 1 = EU, 2 = US, 3 = UK, for reporting context.

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 = EU, 2 = US, 3 = UK, for reporting context.
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 = AB, 2 = ABD, 3 = İngiltere, raporlama bağlamı için.
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 = EU, 2 = US, 3 = UK für den Berichtskontext.
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 = UE, 2 = US, 3 = UK, pour le contexte de rapport.
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 = UE, 2 = EE. UU., 3 = RU, para contexto de informe.
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 = الاتحاد الأوروبي، 2 = الولايات المتحدة، 3 = المملكة المتحدة، لسياق التقارير.

businessContext_i18n.de: 1 = Benzin, 2 = Diesel, 3 = elektrisches Äquivalent (für den Kontext).

inputs.label: Vehicle Class
inputs.businessContext: 1 = passenger car, 2 = light truck, 3 = heavy duty (for context).

businessContext_i18n.en: 1 = passenger car, 2 = light truck, 3 = heavy duty (for context).
businessContext_i18n.tr: 1 = binek araç, 2 = hafif kamyon, 3 = ağır hizmet (bağlam için).
businessContext_i18n.de: 1 = Personenkraftwagen, 2 = leichter Lkw, 3 = Schwerlast (für den Kontext).
businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 = voiture particulière, 2 = camion léger, 3 = poids lourd (pour contexte).
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 = turismo, 2 = camión ligero, 3 = vehículo pesado (para contexto).
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 = سيارة ركاب، 2 = شاحنة خفيفة، 3 = شاحنة ثقيلة (للسياق).

businessContext_i18n.fr: 1 = autoroute, 2 = ville, 3 = combiné (contexte de condition de conduite).
businessContext_i18n.es: 1 = autopista, 2 = ciudad, 3 = combinado (contexto de condiciones de conducción).
businessContext_i18n.ar: 1 = طريق سريع، 2 = مدينة، 3 = مشترك (سياق ظروف القيادة).

breakdown: Calculated MPG: output_mpg miles per gallon
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.

rules.message: Fuel consumption must be greater than 0.
